payload.answer: In Admin SQL select-only mode, SELECT queries are permitted to retrieve data (e.g., SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10), but DELETE operations are explicitly denied to prevent data modification. This ensures read-only access for auditing or inspection purposes while maintaining data integrity.

entity_resolution.reason: Matched to defined policy fixture for debug_sql_select_only_001__context

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL select-only mode permits SELECT queries on memory_cards but denies DELETE, INSERT, and UPDATE operations.

details: Policy interpreted correctly: SELECT allowed, DELETE denied.
No conflicting or superseded facts present.
Response adheres to read-only memory constraints.
